examples: A small sloop with a mainsail, jib, and keel but no bowsprit.
The martingale guy was snapped at the base near the bowsprit cap.
The HISPANIOLA rolled steadily, dipping her bowsprit now and then with a whiff of spray.
Others choose to help the crew set the sails, or clamber out to ride the bowsprit.
Michiel de Ruyter hangs alongside plundered treasure gold coins, mighty cannons, a carved bowsprit that he wrested from Spanish ships in battle.
